title: Estevez approda al Palermo: il centrocampista ha firmato un accordo pluriennale
excerpt: Volto nuovo nel Palermo di Filippo Inzaghi, con il club che si è assicurato Nahuel Estevez, dopo che il calciatore aveva salutato il Parma: non precisata la durata del contratto, definito solo pluriennale.
summary: "Il Palermo FC comunica di aver acquisito le prestazioni sportive di Nahuel Estévez. Il calciatore, svincolatosi dal Parma Calcio, si è legato al Club di Viale del Fante con un contratto pluriennale. A Nahuel il benvenuto a Palermo da parte del City Football Group, del presidente Mirri e di tutta la famiglia rosanero".

title: Tutti salutano tranne Henrikh Mkhitaryan: perché l’Inter ha deciso di rinnovare con l'armeno
excerpt: Giornata di saluti, in casa Inter.
summary: Giornata di saluti, in casa Inter. Il club nerazzurro vede partire diversi elementi della spina dorsale della squadra nelle ultime stagioni, da Yann Sommer a Stefan De Vrij, passando per Matteo Darmian e Francesco Acerbi. In tutti questi saluti, mancano e mancheranno quelli a Henrikh Mkhitaryan. Il centrocampista armeno ha infatti rinnovato il proprio contratto. Ci sono tre motivazioni molto chiare. La duttilità tattica È la chiave principale. Anche nella stagione appena conclusa, l’ex Roma e Manchester United ha dimostrato di saper ricoprire tutti i ruoli del centrocampo, compreso quello di regista all’occorrenza. Peraltro, essendo “nato” come mezzapunta offensiva, Mkhitaryan potrebbe anche agire alle spalle dell’attaccante in un ipotetico 3-4-2-1, un modulo che stuzzica da sempre Cristian Chivu, anche se di fatto non l’ha mai potuto mettere in atto. In un momento in cui è difficile trovare giocatori così polivalenti, è una risorsa che l’Inter vuole tenersi stretta. Esperienza, senza casi La seconda motivazione è quella legata all’età media della squadra, che si abbasserà ed è nei programmi del club. Però un veterano fa sempre comodo - e infatti l’Inter avrebbe trattenuto volentieri anche De Vrij -, per di più se si tratta di un giocatore che non creerebbe alcun problema, o quasi, passando diverse partite in panchina. Per fare un esempio: Sommer, anche considerando il suo ruolo, sarebbe stato “declassato” da titolare a riserva, una gestione non facilissima. Molto più natural...

title: Trapani, il dopo Volume può essere Pasquale Logiudice: contatti in corso
excerpt: Dopo la risoluzione di Luigi Volume il Trapani si muove per il nuovo direttore sportivo.
summary: Dopo la risoluzione di Luigi Volume il Trapani si muove per il nuovo direttore sportivo. Contatti in corso con Pasquale Lo Giudice, ex tra le altre di Messina, Cavese e Juve Stabia. Granata al lavoro, il dopo Volume può essere Logiudice… FC Trapani 1905 rende noto che, a causa di rilevanti problemi di salute, è stato consensualmente risolto il rapporto professionale con il Direttore Luigi Volume. Il Club esprime il più sentito ringraziamento al Direttore per la dedizione e la professionalità dimostrate nel corso del suo incarico, augurandogli una pronta e completa guarigione. La Società comunicherà nei prossimi giorni il nominativo del nuovo Direttore Sportivo.

title: Leggende del calcio mondiale al passo d'addio con la Serie A: salutano Modric e Pedro
excerpt: Oggi è il 30 giugno e questo nel mondo del calcio professionistico significa che i contratti di alcuni protagonisti della Serie A (ma anche in B e in C) arrivano alla naturale scadenza dei termini.
summary: Oggi è il 30 giugno e questo nel mondo del calcio professionistico significa che i contratti di alcuni protagonisti della Serie A (ma anche in B e in C) arrivano alla naturale scadenza dei termini. E senza un rinnovo, significa addio a costo zero. Modric saluta dopo l'anno in Italia Tra coloro che salutano la Serie A ci sono anche due leggende del calcio mondiale. Una, purtroppo per noi, transitata per un solo anno e quando aveva già oltrepassato i quaranta: ciononostante Luka Modric, nella sua stagione al Milan, ha dimostrato perché il suo nome abbia campeggiato a lungo nel cartellone ritraente le stelle del calcio globale. Certo, il risultato finale è stato deludente, con la mancata qualificazione a una Champions che sembrava già in pugno la cui conseguenza è stata azzeramento dell'assetto tecnico e dirigenziale, ma gli sforzi profusi dal nazionale croato sono stati tali che nessuno potrà recriminargli niente. Neanche la mancata voglia di rimanere ancora in rossonero: se dovessero essere confermate le sensazioni raccontate da chi lo conosce bene, si ritirerà dopo il Mondiale. Pedro via dalla Capitale 6 anni dopo Lascia Roma e il nostro campionato un altro monumento del calcio recente come Pedro. Lo spagnolo in Italia ha conosciuto solo la Capitale, prima sulla sponda giallorossa e poi con la maglia della Lazio. La sua avventura più prolungata e soddisfacente, tra le due, purtroppo per lui non conclusa con una notte da ricordare. L'occasione c'è anche stata, la finale dell'u...

title: Conferme in riva al lago: il Como 1907 va avanti con Mazzantini, il Como Women con Tramezzani
excerpt: "L’arrivo di Mazzantini rappresenta una chiara dichiarazione d’intenti: costruire una squadra competitiva con basi solide e un’identità a lungo termine": così, il 10 luglio 2025, il Como 1907, che affidava al tecnico Selena Mazzantini la sua prima squadra....
summary: "L’arrivo di Mazzantini rappresenta una chiara dichiarazione d’intenti: costruire una squadra competitiva con basi solide e un’identità a lungo termine": così, il 10 luglio 2025, il Como 1907, che affidava al tecnico Selena Mazzantini la sua prima squadra. Si parlava allora di "futura promozione", ma la stessa è arrivata, e la compagine lariana sarà ai nastri di partenza della prossima Serie A Women. Con in panchina sempre Mazzantini, perché l'allenatrice è stata confermata alla guida del club. Conferme anche in casa Como Women, dove il 10 febbraio era stato annunciato Paolo Tramezzani come nuovo allenatore: il tecnico aveva firmato un contratto biennale, fino dunque al giugno 2028, e lo stesso sarà fatto valere, perché la proprietà bianconera è rimasta soddisfatta del percorso dell'allenatore, che non dovrà ridiscutere l'accordo e sarà quindi in panchina.

title: Maresca to Man City – But Why Is Italy Ignoring Him?
excerpt: Manchester City have officially appointed Enzo Maresca as their new head coach. Click here to...
summary: Manchester City have officially appointed Enzo Maresca as their new head coach. Although the former Juventus midfielder enjoyed a lengthy playing career in Serie A, he achieved his greatest success abroad, both on the pitch and in the dugout. Maresca has yet to manage in Italy’s top flight, instead building his coaching reputation overseas while working under some of football’s most influential managers and developing a modern, internationally inspired tactical approach.

title: Vlahovic tops list of 49 out-of-contract players in Serie A on June 30
excerpt: June 30 is upon us and a list of 49 Serie A players are set...
summary: June 30 is upon us and a list of 49 Serie A players are set to become available on free transfers by the end of the day, none more prominent than Juventus’s Dusan Vlahovic, for whom a new deal appears increasingly unlikely. 19 out of the 20 clubs competing in the 2026-27 Serie A season have at least one player into the final day of their contracts on Tuesday – Atalanta are the only side with none. Some clubs remain in talks over extensions, such as Roma with the likes of Paulo Dybala and Zeki Celik, or Inter with Henrikh Mkhitaryan, but for Vlahovic, the situation remains less clear.

title: Manchester City ready to enter €100m Tonali race after Maresca appointment
excerpt: Reports in Italy claim that newly-appointed Manchester City head coach is targeting the signing of...
summary: Reports in Italy claim that newly-appointed Manchester City head coach is targeting the signing of Italy international Sandro Tonali from Newcastle United as he begins life as the successor to Pep Guardiola at the Etihad Stadium. Maresca was officially appointed as the new head coach of Manchester City on Monday following a complicated and turbulent exit from Chelsea at the beginning of 2026. It is believed that City have had to pay around €20m in compensation to Chelsea and the West London outfit has also confirmed that Maresca himself has had to pay compensation due to the nature of his exit from the club in January. Despite the back-and-forth between City and Chelsea, the matter is now done, Maresca is now the head coach at The Etihad, and reports indicate that he is ready to start plotting transfer moves ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

title: Official: Inter part company with Sommer, Acerbi and Darmian – ‘Thank you’
excerpt: Inter have confirmed that they have parted company with senior squad members Yann Sommer, Francesco...
summary: Inter have confirmed that they have parted company with senior squad members Yann Sommer, Francesco Acerbi and Matteo Darmian whose contracts expire today: ‘Thank you for everything’. 37-year-old goalkeeper Sommer joined Inter in the summer of 2023 and has served as the club’s no.1 for the last three seasons, making 100 Serie A appearances during his time in Italy, 139 across all competitions. The former Switzerland international won two Serie A titles, a Coppa Italia, a Supercoppa Italiana and reached the 2024-25 Champions League final during his time in San Siro.

title: Juventus moving quickly for Ekhator and could send Next Gen talent to Genoa
excerpt: A deal between Juventus and Genoa involving Italy U21 striker Jeff Ekhator appears to be...
summary: A deal between Juventus and Genoa involving Italy U21 striker Jeff Ekhator appears to be moving quickly and updates on Tuesday morning claim that the Bianconeri are looking to include Next Gen versatile full-back David Puczka as part of the deal. According to reports from various outlets across Italy on Monday evening, Juventus are pushing to secure a surprise deal for Ekhator, whose current employers need to make a sale before the end of the month to help balance their books. This means that if a deal does go through, there is a chance it is settled before the end of the day. According to updates from Gianluca Di Marzio on Tuesday, contact between the two clubs has continued through the morning. The two sides are discussing a package worth around €15m.

title: Pick Mainoo over Anderson against DR Congo - Rooney
excerpt: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says he would start Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo instead of Elliot Anderson in Wednesday's World Cup last-32 tie with DR Congo.
summary: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says he would start Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo instead of Elliot Anderson in Wednesday's World Cup last-32 tie with DR Congo. Mainoo has not won a competitive cap for England since September 2024, having dropped out of the United team under former manager Ruben Amorim. However, under Michael Carrick the 21-year-old won his place back for United - then England - and played in his country's past four friendlies, though failed to make it off the bench in the group games.

title: Germany beaten on penalties as Paraguay reach last 16
excerpt: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.
summary: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.

title: 'Germany no longer first-class team ' - is this the end for Nagelsmann?
excerpt: Germany make a shock last-32 exit against Paraguay, losing a World Cup penalty shootout for the first time to pile pressure on boss Julian Nagelsmann.
summary: Paraguay stun Germany on penalties to reach last 16 There was a time when Germany were expected to win football tournaments. Including their spell competing as West Germany, they have won the World Cup four times, losing in the final another four times, and they have won three of the six European Championship finals they have been in.

title: US security chief 'danced happy dance' after Iran exit
excerpt: The United States' head of homeland security says he "danced a happy dance" when Iran's elimination from the World Cup was confirmed.
summary: Markwayne Mullin was approved as Kristi Noem's successor in March The United States' head of homeland security said he "danced a happy dance" when Iran were eliminated from the World Cup. Iran missed out on qualifying from the group stage on goal difference after having a stoppage-time winner against Egypt disallowed for a marginal offside.

title: Emotional Gakpo scores days after loss of unborn son
excerpt: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo scores for the Netherlands days after the loss of his unborn son, as they are knocked out on penalties by Morocco.
summary: Cody Gakpo opened the scoring in the 72nd minute against Morocco Cody Gakpo appeared to be in tears as he scored for the Netherlands only days after the loss of his unborn son. The Liverpool forward, 27, scored the opening goal in the Netherlands' last-32 tie against Morocco, which they went on to lose 3-2 on penalties following a 1-1 draw after extra time.

title: World Cup 2026: Dutch despair, Klopp plays down Germany job links after exit – live
excerpt: • Paraguay stun Germany, Morocco send Dutch home
summary: If you like your podcasts in moving picture form then do I have a treat for you! Max, Barry, Archie and Nicky in glorious technicolour on the thrills and spills from yesterday:

title: Morocco edge wild last-32 penalty shootout as Netherlands pay heavy price for misses
excerpt: Morocco’s players set off in pursuit of Ismael Saibari and, once they had caught up, lost one another in a pile of exhilarated bodies. Maybe they are about to do it all again and make a heavy dent in the latter stages of a World Cup. This was certainly a huge hurdle cleared and there were echoes
summary: Morocco’s players set off in pursuit of Ismael Saibari and, once they had caught up, lost one another in a pile of exhilarated bodies. Maybe they are about to do it all again and make a heavy dent in the latter stages of a World Cup. This was certainly a huge hurdle cleared and there were echoes of 2022 when Yassine Bounou, hero against Spain back then, repelled the Netherlands’ fifth penalty. Crysencio Summerville had struck it straight at him, the latest error in a strange and wobbly shootout; Saibari showed rare mental clarity to accept the gift. Earlier on another bundle had engulfed Cody Gakpo. Football is a vessel for myriad thoughts and feelings so it was an intensely affecting moment when, after he had rammed his team into a 72nd-minute lead, the entire Dutch squad piled on to the pitch in joy. More than that, they had done so in support. Gakpo had elected to play despite the announcement that he and his partner had tragically lost their unborn son. He was tearful upon making his way back to the centre circle, pointing to the sky and being comforted by his teammate Denzel Dumfries. There are other timelines in which Gakpo’s goal was the winner, with easy words spoken about sport’s redemptive nature carrying the day. But there will always be infinitely more important things than football, however the game behaves. It tends to carve its own path and has never relinquished the right to be viciously cruel. In the first minute of added time the Morocco substitute Chemsdine...

title: Canale and Gill the heroes as Paraguay hand Germany first World Cup shootout defeat
excerpt:
Germany exited the World Cup in Boston not with a whimper or even a cry of pain, just an extended wrestle into the dust at the hands of a thrillingly dogged Paraguay, followed by the most extraordinary of penalty shootouts.

Not only did Germany lose their first shootout since the original P
summary: Germany exited the World Cup in Boston not with a whimper or even a cry of pain, just an extended wrestle into the dust at the hands of a thrillingly dogged Paraguay, followed by the most extraordinary of penalty shootouts. Not only did Germany lose their first shootout since the original Panenka one of 1976. They did so in a whirl of errors, shanked kicks and what amounted to a sporting meltdown in the New England gloaming. Paraguay will now progress to play a last-16 tie in Philadelphia, but not before celebrating this result as surely the greatest in their football history. And rightly so, after a performance of wonderful heart and defensive discipline. For Julian Nagelsmann New England feels like the end of the road. This is not the Germany of the high-end academy boom years. But they’re better than this. Jürgen Klopp has spent the current tournament cheerfully judging Nagelsmann from the TV studio, apologising for judging him, and generally trying to pretend he wouldn’t actively love to have a go in the job. That chance might just be around the corner. Be careful what you wish for Jürgen.

title: ‘The right path’: Carlo Ancelotti keeps cool after Brazil survive Japan scare in last 32
excerpt:
• Ancelotti says late win was Brazil’s ‘most complete game’

  • Hajime Moriyasu says Japan ‘have to improve’

Carlo Ancelotti was characteristically calm after
summary: Ancelotti says late win was Brazil’s ‘most complete game’ Carlo Ancelotti was characteristically calm after Brazil’s 2-1 victory against Japan on Monday, insisting he had never doubted his team would get back into the game and warning they are getting better and better. “At half-time I told the players to be patient because sooner or later we would score,” Ancelotti said. “What was important was to keep our structure. We know we’re going down the right path and we have to continue on this path.”

title: How DR Congo’s football team became a rare source of national unity
excerpt:
Historic run to the last 32 and a match against England have left proud fans back home dancing late into the night

The Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) had not been at a World Cup finals tournament for 52 years – but they are making up for lost time in North America. After
summary: Historic run to the last 32 and a match against England have left proud fans back home dancing late into the night The Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) had not been at a World Cup finals tournament for 52 years – but they are making up for lost time in North America. After a draw against Portugal, a narrow defeat by Colombia and a 3-1 victory against Uzbekistan – inspired by Yoane Wissa’s two goals – they have already made history by booking a place in the knockout phase. Now they face England. “We deserve to play England,” Wissa said when the match-up had been confirmed. “We have worked hard for this. You know, it’s not easy in our country. There is war in eastern Congo. Every time we wear this shirt, we think about them.”

title: Merson: Bellingham's deeper role has given Tuchel midfield headache
excerpt: Paul Merson thinks England boss Thomas Tuchel has a bit of a midfield headache after Jude Bellingham's excellent performance in a deeper role in the 2-0 win over Panama.
summary: Sky Sports' Paul Merson: "Thomas Tuchel now has a major problem after Jude Bellingham's performance in a deeper role against Panama. Bellingham really impressed, but that is where Declan Rice plays, and if fit, he plays. When we come up against the bigger teams, you'll need Rice" Paul Merson thinks England boss Thomas Tuchel has a bit of a midfield headache after Jude Bellingham's excellent performance in a deeper role in the 2-0 win over Panama. Bellingham lined up alongside Elliot Anderson and grabbed a goal and an assist in an all-action midfield display, leaving Tuchel with plenty to think about ahead of the Three Lions' last 32 clash with DR Congo on Wednesday.

title: El Barça se toma su tiempo con Julián Álvarez
excerpt: Esperará al final del Mundial para lanzar su ofensiva definitiva
summary: Esperará al final del Mundial para lanzar su ofensiva definitiva El Barcelona sigue teniendo a Julián Álvarez como su principal objetivo de mercado. La situación es muy complicada porque el Atlético sigue negándose a vender al jugador al Barcelona, a pesar de las palabras de este último, quien aseguró que lo mejor para todas las partes sería un traspaso. El club azulgrana mantiene su estrategia con el objetivo de lograr que el club rojiblanco se decida a negociar. Sin embargo, ahora se tomará un tiempo antes de lanzar lo que podría considerarse el ataque definitivo. El Barcelona no quiere intervenir ahora que el Mundial ha llegado a las eliminatorias y todas las selecciones se juegan tanto. Es verdad que Julián habló durante la competición, pero entonces se estaban disputando los partidos de la fase de grupos.

title: Abde cambia la incertidumbre por la certeza
excerpt: El hispano-argelino se ganó la confianza de Quique en la recta final del curso y afronta una temporada clave para consolidarse como pieza importante en este Alavés
summary: El hispano-argelino se ganó la confianza de Quique en la recta final del curso y afronta una temporada clave para consolidarse como pieza importante en este Alavés Hace exactamente un año, Abde Rebbach era uno de los jugadores de la plantilla del Alavés que desconocía cuál iba a ser su futuro. El canterano regresaba a Vitoria tras finalizar su cesión en el Granada. Su continuidad no estaba clara, pero Coudet decidió apostar por su permanencia ante la falta de refuerzos en la banda izquierda. Sin ser un fijo en los planes del técnico argentino y a base de superar obstáculos, el extremo terminó siendo determinante en la permanencia babazorra. La llegada de Quique Sánchez Flores y, sobre todo, su aportación en la remontada histórica en Balaidos supuso un punto de inflexión. Desde entonces, fue un jugador clave para el técnico madrileño y, al contrario que el pasado verano, este año tiene garantizada su continuidad en Vitoria. Su excelente rendimiento en el tramo final del curso le permitió estar en la prelista de Argelia para el Mundial, aunque finalmente no pudo lograr estar entre los elegidos.

title: Oficial: Salma Paralluelo deja el Barcelona
excerpt: La atacante aragonesa da por terminada una etapa de cuatro temporadas como azulgrana
summary: La atacante aragonesa da por terminada una etapa de cuatro temporadas como azulgrana Salma Paralluelo pone fin a su etapa en el FC Barcelona una vez concluya su contrato el próximo 30 de junio de 2026. La futbolista aragonesa se despedirá del conjunto azulgrana tras cuatro temporadas en las que ha contribuido a conquistar 15 títulos: tres Ligas de Campeones, cuatro campeonatos de Liga, tres Copas de la Reina, cuatro Supercopas de España y una Copa Cataluña.

title: Domingos duarte se despide del Getafe tras cuatro temporadas: "Siempre desearé lo mejor para este club y esta ciudad"
excerpt: Marcó el primer tanto, un golazo, de los célticos, que alcanzan la séptima plaza tras ocho jornadas sin perder
summary: El portugués comunica su salida a través de sus redes sociales Domingos Duarte no continuará en el Getafe CF. El central luso, que finaliza contrato este 1 de julio con el conjunto getafense, no renovará y saldrá del equipo que dirige José Bordalás. Este martes el zaguero quiso despedirse de la que ha sido su afición los últimos cuatro años a través de un comunicado emitido en sus redes sociales. “Ha sido un privilegio y un orgullo defender este escudo en más de 100 partidos, gracias a todos los que me habéis acompañado en este maravilloso camino: compañeros, cuerpos técnicos, staff… y, por supuesto, gracias a vosotros, afición. Por vuestro cariño, vuestra entrega y vuestra pasión. Siempre me he sentido como en casa. Llegué a Getafe con muchos sueños por cumplir”, destacó Duarte.

title: Resiliencia táctica en blanco y rojo
excerpt: Alemania fue de más a menos en el torneo. Paraguay, a la inversa. Lección magistral de Alfaro en la conducción. Felicidad guaraní
summary: Alemania fue de más a menos en el torneo. Paraguay, a la inversa. Lección magistral de Alfaro en la conducción. Felicidad guaraní Los penaltis hicieron que las cuatro estrellas teutonas fueran simplemente estrellas fugaces. 'Pinchando' el cielo de Boston con balones aéreos ante el embudo construido por Paraguay por el centro, los germanos claudicaron en dramática definición. Un golazo (Enciso) en sus escasas llegadas puso en ventaja a los sudamericanos y una 'peinadita' (Havertz) que desorienta porteros sirvió para Alemania empatar. Con 3-4 final (1-1), Gill confirmó su protagonismo. En Paraguay, Cubas cinco pulmones, Galarza, la dinámica y Almirón, la zurda que inventa, fueron los intérpretes de una banda afinada. Armonía en los movimientos del bloque, con variantes en el sistema original y cambios que mantuvieron el espíritu. Mauricio , otro zurdo de cuidado, mostraron que no sólo con garra se logra el éxito.

title: L'Ecuador cambia capitano al Mondiale, Valencia incorona Caicedo: "Sei quel leader"
excerpt: L'Ecuador ha preso una decisione sorprendente: la fascia da capitano cambia proprietario nel bel mezzo del Mondiale 2026.
summary: L'Ecuador ha preso una decisione sorprendente: la fascia da capitano cambia proprietario nel bel mezzo del Mondiale 2026. Il veterano Enner Valencia (36 anni) cede così la fascia a Moises Caicedo, stella del Chelsea, proprio alla vigilia della partita dei sedicesimi di finale contro il Messico. "L'unica cosa che mi importa alla fine della partita è darvi un abbraccio, e sento che vi darò un abbraccio di gioia perché sarà l'abbraccio della qualificazione", ha esordito l'ormai ex leader della 'La Tri' nel suo discorso, prima di rivolgersi a Caicedo: "Moi, fratello, puoi venire un momento?". "Fratello, questa fascia è tua. Tu, o chiunque altro sia qui dentro, potresti indossarla. Siamo tutti quel leader di cui ha bisogno il compagno che ci sta accanto. Tu sei quel leader", ha assicurato Valencia, capocannoniere storico dell'Ecuador con 49 gol in 108 presenze internazionali. La benedizione di Moises Caicedo nell'Ecuador con 3 reti in 64 partite è ufficiale.

title: Bella-Kotchap ha firmato col Venezia. È il terzo acquisto dei lagunari nel giro di tre giorni
excerpt: Armel Bella-Kotchap è un nuovo giocatore del Venezia.
summary: Armel Bella-Kotchap è un nuovo giocatore del Venezia. Il difensore tedesco ha firmato in questi minuti col club lagunare ed è il nuovo rinforzo di Giovanni Stroppa. Si tratta del terzo acquisto stagionale, dopo il polacco Kornel Lisman, arrivato dal Lech Poznan e ufficializzato sabato 27 luglio e Lorenzo Berardi, acquistato dal Pescara.

title: Cremonese, sirene estere per Sanabria: c'è il Lanus sul centravanti del Paraguay
excerpt: Impegnato con il suo Paraguay ai Mondiali, questa sera partirà dalla panchina nella sfida dei sedicesimi contro la Germania, il centravanti Antonio Sanabria è anche al centro di numerose voci di mercato che lo vogliono lontano dalla Cremonese dopo la...
summary: Impegnato con il suo Paraguay ai Mondiali, questa sera partirà dalla panchina nella sfida dei sedicesimi contro la Germania, il centravanti Antonio Sanabria è anche al centro di numerose voci di mercato che lo vogliono lontano dalla Cremonese dopo la retrocessione in Serie B. Secondo quanto riferito da Sky Sport il classe ‘96, autore di un solo gol in 26 presenze con i grigiorossi in Serie A, sarebbe finito nel mirino del Lanus che avrebbe avviato i primi contatti con il club per portarlo in Argentina. Decisiva sarà la volontà del calciatore paraguayano che solo una volta terminata l’avventura iridata potrebbe prendere in esame l’offerta dei sudamericani. Sul centravanti c'è inoltre da registrare un interessamento anche da parte del Palermo che lo vorrebbe come vice-Pohjanpalo nella prossima stagione.

title: Nico Paz: "Un altro anno al Como è la cosa migliore per me e per il Real Madrid"
excerpt: Nico Paz resta al Como, è ufficiale.
summary: Nico Paz resta al Como, è ufficiale. Il talento argentino ha commentato con gioia la notizia tramite l'account Instagram del club lariano: "Dopo molte settimane di riflessione, ho deciso che la scelta migliore per la mia carriera in questo momento è continuare al Como per un altro anno, un club che mi ha dato l'opportunità di crescere e di diventare il calciatore che sono oggi. Credo personalmente che questa sia la decisione migliore sia per me sia per il Real Madrid, perché questo è un anno molto importante in questa fase della mia carriera e rappresenta un'opportunità unica per continuare a crescere come calciatore e prepararmi nel migliore dei modi per il futuro". E poi, ancora, altre dichiarazioni di Nico Paz arrivano dall'account X del Como: "Ciao Comaschi, sono molto felice di poter annunciare che rimarrò al Como per un altro anno con voi. Sono davvero emozionato e non vedo l'ora di iniziare la nuova stagione e di rivedervi tutti allo stadio. Forza Como.”

title: Brasile agli ottavi, Neymar rimasto fuori. Ancelotti: "Sarebbe dovuto entrare ai supplementari"
excerpt: Il Brasile passa agli ottavi di Coppa del Mondo 2026, con un gol nel finale da cardiopalma firmato da Gabriel Martinelli per il 2-1 in rimonta sul Giappone.
summary: Il Brasile passa agli ottavi di Coppa del Mondo 2026, con un gol nel finale da cardiopalma firmato da Gabriel Martinelli per il 2-1 in rimonta sul Giappone. Il commissario tecnico Carlo Ancelotti, intervenuto nel post-trionfo, ha spiegato tuttavia il motivo per cui non abbia schierato Neymar nella ripresa, fuoriclasse 34enne invece rimasto in panchina tutta la durata del match. Svelando che il numero 10 sarebbe entrato nei tempi supplementari, ma alla fine non è stato necessario: "Stavamo aspettando Neymar per i tempi supplementari. Ho parlato con lui, sarebbe dovuto entrare intorno al 60° o 65° minuto. Abbiamo pareggiato la partita e non ho voluto cambiare la struttura perché la squadra aveva il controllo del match", la motivazione ulteriore riportata dal tecnico italiano. Nel secondo tempo, Neymar ha iniziato a riscaldarsi a bordo campo. Al 25° minuto, i tifosi sugli spalti hanno cominciato a gridare il suo nome. Pochi istanti dopo, Ancelotti ha interrotto il riscaldamento - secondo quanto riferito da Globo Esporte - della stella brasiliana, lasciando invece gli altri giocatori a scaldarsi. Agli ottavi di finale, ora, i verdeoro affronteranno una tra Norvegia e Costa d'Avorio. "Abbiamo molte risorse, sia in panchina che in campo, ed è positivo che i singoli giocatori siano a un buon livello", ha dichiarato Ancelotti. "Dobbiamo valorizzarlo. È stata una partita molto impegnativa. Il Giappone non è una squadra facile, è intensa e molto organizzata".

title: Inter: ‘Realistic’ on Jones, Camavinga and Solet problems
excerpt: Inter CEO Piero Ausilio admits there is ‘a big gap’ with Liverpool’s valuation of Curtis...
summary: Inter CEO Piero Ausilio admits there is ‘a big gap’ with Liverpool’s valuation of Curtis Jones, while going cold on Oumar Solet and Eduardo Camavinga. ‘We have to be realistic.’ The Nerazzurri chief was speaking at an event in Rimini this evening to mark the opening of the Serie A transfer market, so held several different interviews. You can read more of his comments here on missing out for Marco Palestra to Chelsea.

title: Report Liberali wanted by Amorim for Milan return, but preference is Como
excerpt: In a new twist, Ruben Amorim has reportedly asked Milan to bring Mattia Liberali back...
summary: In a new twist, Ruben Amorim has reportedly asked Milan to bring Mattia Liberali back to San Siro, although he seems more inclined towards Como. The midfielder impressed in Serie B with Catanzaro this term and is eager to make his mark in the top flight. A product of the Milan youth academy, he was effectively handed to Catanzaro in August 2025 for free, with the promise that they would retain a 50 per cent cut of his future sale fee.

title: Video: Don Carlo Ancelotti keeps calm amid Brazil madness
excerpt: Italian coach Carlo Ancelotti has become legendary for his calm reactions to success and provided...
summary: Italian coach Carlo Ancelotti has become legendary for his calm reactions to success and provided another meme during Brazil’s last-gasp winner against Japan in the 2026 World Cup. The tactician is the only man in history to win all five major European Leagues, victorious with Milan, Chelsea, Paris Saint-Germain, Real Madrid and Bayern Munich. He is also the most successful coach in the Champions League, lifting it five times between the Rossoneri and Real Madrid.

title: Juventus eager for Ekhator, potential deal with Genoa worth €15m
excerpt: Juventus are reportedly pushing to purchase Italy international striker Jeff Ekhator from Genoa for a...
summary: Juventus are reportedly pushing to purchase Italy international striker Jeff Ekhator from Genoa for a fee of around €15m. According to Sky Sport Italia, the negotiations are in full swing and could even be completed over the next 24 hours. This is because Genoa need a sale to help balance the books by the June 30 deadline.

title: Official: Nico Paz remains at Como with Real Madrid option
excerpt: Real Madrid have officially confirmed that Nico Paz will remain at Como with a buy-back...
summary: Real Madrid have officially confirmed that Nico Paz will remain at Como with a buy-back option for 2027, noting it was ‘made at the player’s own request.’ It was already known that the clubs had shaken hands on the deal, which will see Como purchase the remaining 50 per cent of his contract for a fee of €60m. The buy-back option, which is only valid for the summer of 2027, will allow Real Madrid to bring him back for €80m.

title: Why Maresca? What Man City fans can expect from Guardiola's successor
excerpt: Pep Guardiola passes the baton on to Enzo Maresca, but why have Manchester City chosen the Italian as the Spaniard's replacement?
summary: Enzo Maresca has signed a three-year deal as Manchester City boss After three years away, Enzo Maresca has returned to Manchester City. The Italian, who was Pep Guardiola's assistant during City's Treble-winning 2022-23 campaign, has succeeded the Spaniard as City's new head coach on a three-year deal.

title: How to win a World Cup penalty shootout
excerpt: We have a look at what can be learned from every World Cup penalty taken in a shootout ever.
summary: The World Cup is entering the knockout stages - which means penalty shootouts are back. The 2022 tournament had a record five shootouts - and with an extra round in 2026, the last 32, there is a good chance that gets broken again. So what have we learned from the 320 spot-kicks taken across 35 penalty shootouts since 1982?

title: Harsh reality behind Scotland fans' calls for Moyes & Postecoglou
excerpt: Some Scotland fans are dreaming of David Moyes or Ange Postecoglou replacing Steve Clarke, but could either man be a realistic prospect?
summary: David Moyes (left) said in 2021 that he would be interested in the Scotland job in the future, while Ange Postecoglou is currently out of work The Scottish FA insists it will "cast the net as far and wide" as possible to find Steve Clarke's successor - but has elite club football shrunk the pool of big catches? Following the shock news of Clarke's resignation, many names have been put forward by fans in group chats and on social media, though two stand out above the others.

title: Bournemouth reject Arsenal interest in Scott
excerpt: Bournemouth reject an enquiry from Arsenal for Alex Scott and say the midfielder is not for sale this summer.
summary: Alex Scott scored a fine winner for Bournemouth at Arsenal in April Bournemouth have rejected an enquiry from Arsenal for Alex Scott and say the midfielder is not for sale this summer. The Premier League champions want to sign a new central midfielder, with the 22-year-old understood to be one of their targets.

title: Brazil into last 16 as Martinelli strikes in stoppage time to break Japan hearts
excerpt: Not for the first time in this tournament, there were long periods when Brazil did not impress. And not for the first time in this tournament, they got away with it. It may be inexplicable but the Carlo Ancelotti method that worked at Real Madrid is working again: stay in games and eventually eit
summary: Not for the first time in this tournament, there were long periods when Brazil did not impress. And not for the first time in this tournament, they got away with it. It may be inexplicable but the Carlo Ancelotti method that worked at Real Madrid is working again: stay in games and eventually either opponents will make a mistake or brilliant players will do something brilliant. Brazil were 1-0 down at half-time and struggling. Their earliest ever exit form a World Cup seemed entirely possible. Five players in the Brazil starting lineup were aged over 30, five of the six defensive players – and they looked it. Japan were quicker, slicker, sharper and more imaginative. But the introduction of Endrick and a change of shape and approach at half-time changed everything. Brazil started slinging crosses into the box and Japan wobbled. Casemiro, barely a pedestrian in the first half, headed the equaliser and, deep into injury time, Gabriel Martinelli squeezed in the winner. Japan had never won a World Cup knockout match, something that their manager Hajime Moriyasu acknowledged has become a psychological issue, so much so that his insistence before the tournament that Japan should be thinking of winning it was seen by many as an attempt to shock them over that issue. They still haven’t, but this is surely the best they have ever performed at a World Cup.

title: Deschamps hopes France’s ‘capacity for danger’ continues in Sweden World Cup test
excerpt:
• Teams meet in round of 32 in New York on Tuesday

  • ‘We’ve been labelled as favourites … we are confident’

Didier Deschamps has warned France’s rivals that the team will not change their attacking approach to this World Cup, saying as he prepared for the last-3
summary: ‘We’ve been labelled as favourites … we are confident’ Didier Deschamps has warned France’s rivals that the team will not change their attacking approach to this World Cup, saying as he prepared for the last-32 tie against Sweden on Tuesday: “We have a capacity for danger, and I want us to keep it.” The France head coach said it was “good to be busy” as he returned to the camp after time at home fol­lowing the death of his mother last week. Deschamps expressed gratitude for the support he had received from his team after his bereavement, in another sign of the tight bond among Les Bleus this summer.

title: Maddy Cusack’s father tells inquest she was dismayed at Sheffield United manager’s return
excerpt:
• Jonathan Morgan claims he provided player welfare

  • Doctor says Maddy feared mental health stigma

The most significant cause of the deterioration of the late Sheffield United footballer Maddy Cusack’s mental health was the behaviour of Jonathan Morgan, the tea
summary: The most significant cause of the deterioration of the late Sheffield United footballer Maddy Cusack’s mental health was the behaviour of Jonathan Morgan, the team’s manager at the time, her father, David Cusack, has told an inquest. During a tense exchange with David Cusack, Morgan, who is representing himself at the inquest, accused the player’s father of relying on hearsay to form his opinion of him. The former England Under-19s international was found dead at her family home in Derbyshire on 20 September 2023, at the age of 27.

title: The World Cup’s two competing realities: brilliant action and off-field injustices | Jonathan Wilson
excerpt:
All of the critiques of this tournament have proven valid and warranted, even as the action on the pitch has delighted us

• Predict the winner |
summary: All of the critiques of this tournament have proven valid and warranted, even as the action on the pitch has delighted us Predict the winner | Daily podcast | Download our app The football has taken over. Ultimately, that’s what always happens. Football is an incredibly resilient sport, the World Cup an incredibly resilient tournament. It has withstood authoritarian leaders and corruption scandals, the horrific exploitation of migrant workers and military dictatorships, and it looks as though it will survive sky-high ticket prices and immigration policies that make a mockery of Gianni Infantino’s claim that this is the most inclusive World Cup of all time.

title: 90+6! Martinelli sends Brazil through in comeback win vs Japan
excerpt: Gabriel Martinelli's 96th-minute winner saw Brazil dramatically come from behind to win 2-1 and advance to the World Cup last 16, cruelly denying Japan a first-ever knockout stage victory in the competition.
summary: Match report as Brazil beat Japan 2-1 with a comeback win in Houston; Kaishu Sano put Japan ahead at half-time, but Casemiro equalised just after the restart; Gabriel Martinelli came off the bench to net the winner; Brazil will play Norway or Ivory Coast in the last 16 on Sunday Gabriel Martinelli's 96th-minute winner saw Brazil dramatically come from behind to win 2-1 and advance to the World Cup last 16, cruelly denying Japan a first-ever knockout stage victory in the competition. Carlo Ancelotti's side were staring down the barrel of a disastrous early exit when Kaishu Sano scored from the edge of the box in the first half - after he had breezed past Casemiro too easily.
